AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with explicit in-band routing rationale: marks the entry as 'reported', flags 'Not independently verified', and labels follow-ups as steps 'before treating this as actionable' — directly invoking the descriptive-not-prescriptive bar.

AR3.justification: No cross-references in the artifact; a methodology-shaped workspace would expect at minimum a daybook Log breadcrumb pointing to the observation, which is absent.

AR4.justification: Section header is a bare title with no ISO-dated prefix; a re-run on the same prompt would overwrite the section rather than append a new dated entry as observations.md requires.
